sys_script_client.description: Publish Draft Tasks; show a widget or UI Page modal to prompt the User when the task has draft subtasks, otherwise no modal just publish this single task 3.0 | 2023-09-07 | raj | STRY0136615 - STRY0136615 - STRETCH-PLACEHOLDER- Header UI Control 2.8.5 | 2024-10-18 | raj | STRY0154923 - Workflow Issue - move all updates that require additional processing into an event. Remove setWorkflow(false) from task object 2.8 | 2022-07-09 | raj | STRY0119137 - STRY0119138 (corrected platform page name while working other story) 2.8.0 | 2022-06-07 | raj | STRY0122882 - Publish Task(s) button- New Modal to 'Choose Which Tasks to Publish'
sys_script_client.name: Task - onSubmit - Publish Draft Tasks
